```python
solution: 
class Solution:
    def topKFrequent(self, words: List[str], k: int) -> List[str]:
        count = collections.Counter(words)
        return heapq.nsmallest(k, count, key=lambda x: (-count[x], x))
efficiency: HIGH
time complexity: O(n log(k))
space complexity: O(n)
energy implications: LOW
explanation: Utilizes a Counter to store word frequencies and heapq.nsmallest to efficiently retrieve the k most frequent words, sorting by frequency and lexicographical order. 
```
